title: Evangelion ANIMA general
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion ANIMA             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Sep 22, 2007 10:44 pm ※This story, in which the Human Instrumentality Project from episodes 25 and 26 of the anime production "Neon Genesis Evangelion" is never set in motion, is a work portraying a world where Shinji Ikari and the others greet an alternate future.

[]: Evangelion ANIMA (general)             Quote Post by chee » Sat Sep 22, 2007 10:44 pm http://forums.trivialbeing.net/index.php?showtopic=5759 Hmmm.... I'd ask for a SAUCE PLZ, but i'm not registered there.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Sep 22, 2007 10:49 pm I'll believe it when I see it, although I wouldn't put anything past Gainax. However, if it is real, what the hell is Gainax doing with this, Rebuild, and Petit Eva? Shouldn't they space these things out a bit more to insure a steady cashflow?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 22, 2007 10:50 pm Huh. I'm assuming Anno's not involved with this, as usual. If he were, there certainly wouldn't be any contradictions with EoE, like NERV still existing. EDIT: Also, I thought I'd mention that "anima" probably refers to Carl Jung's term for the "true inner self". So they're switching from Freud to Jung now?

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Sep 22, 2007 10:52 pm If it's real, then i'm certainly intrigued. I can imagine a manga or OAV adaptation at one point. Double edit: I want to see NGE go beyond existentialism and go careening into postmodernism.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 22, 2007 10:55 pm Heh, I just noticed that NERV's logo is now NerV.

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Sat Sep 22, 2007 11:10 pm Omni-Evangelions?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 22, 2007 11:16 pm lol whut? I have no clue.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Sep 23, 2007 12:20 am I dunno, this all sounds a little dubious, instrumentality happened in the tv ending too so how is the world ok? Then again maybe this is all just another crazy world cooked up by Shinji after everyone congradulated him.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Sep 23, 2007 12:21 am Defectron wrote: I dunno, this all sounds a little dubious, instrumentality happened in the tv ending too so how is the world ok? Then again maybe this is all just another crazy world cooked up by Shinji after everyone congradulated him.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Sep 23, 2007 8:44 am Like Trvial Being member 'Vir' said "This looks like an alternate universe where the angels appear in longer intervals and the pilots are more intellectually and emotionally mature." - That seems to be the most plausible explanation IMO. In any case, I am really looking forward to this (assuming it turns out to be true).

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Sep 23, 2007 10:15 am Some of them think it may be a sitcom. I damn well hope not. but if you look further down, you'll find a decently amusing friends parody

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Sep 23, 2007 10:29 am Indigo Arcangel wrote: Some of them think it may be a sitcom. I damn well hope not.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Sep 23, 2007 12:03 pm If this was based after eotv, wouldn't it be a bit of a fugitive tale, with all the characters hiding from Seele. (Apart from Ritsuko/Misato who are both shown to have died)

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Sep 23, 2007 12:06 pm wouldn't it be a bit of a fugitive tale, with all the characters hiding from Seele.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Sun Sep 30, 2007 4:15 pm Dude, including this one, how many AU stories are the for EVA?

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Sep 30, 2007 5:00 pm Okay, let's count em' up: Great Detective evangelion Ayanami Raising Project Asuka raising project Shinji Raising Project Angelic days/gos 2 Evangelion 2-Another cases RE-TAKE (well,sorta) Secret of evangelion The new manga which looks like some weird high-school monster fighting thing. Eva@school or whatever it's called The manga and that's just about all the ones i can think of off my head. Any others?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 30, 2007 5:57 pm You forgot Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Avatar of Dreams » Mon Oct 01, 2007 10:04 am NAveryW wrote: You forgot Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:11 am Taking that point of view, there isn't really a poper evangelion universe, is there? Also, the original GOS, although that was more an added episode than an entire universe.
